title: T-051 — UI: FEFO reservations picker + WO panel + FEFO deviation modal — WH-015/016/017/M-09/M-10 (WH §9.1-9.7)
prompt:
# T-051 — UI: FEFO reservations picker + WO panel + FEFO deviation modal — WH-015/016/017/M-09/M-10 (WH §9.1-9.7)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §9.1, §9.3, §9.4, §9.7, §16.6 WH-015/016/017/M-09/M-10
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:3-198 (composed) (available_lp_picker)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:748-805 (reserve_lp_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:808-852 (release_reservation_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:855-913 (fefo_deviation_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx:140-221 (reservations_list_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx:140-221 (panel variant) (wo_reservations_panel)

## Goal
Implement first-class `available_lp_picker` + `wo_reservations_panel` + reserve/release/FEFO-deviation modals with 1:1 prototype parity. WH-015 and WH-017 are first-class data-prototype-label markers per 2026-05-03 decision.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/components/warehouse/picker/available-lp-picker.tsx` — first-class component used in WO detail (04-PLANNING) and reserve flow; renders FEFO-ranked list with rank-1 highlighted; selecting non-rank-1 opens fefo_deviation_modal.
2. `apps/web/components/warehouse/panel/wo-reservations-panel.tsx` — first-class WO-detail panel listing reserved LPs.
3. `apps/web/components/warehouse/modals/{reserve-lp,release-reservation,fefo-deviation}-modal.tsx` per prototype.
4. FEFO deviation modal: comparison cards (suggested vs picked) + reason_code Select + reason_text Textarea; submit always allowed once reason captured (warn never block per Q6B).
5. Reservation modal: blocks intermediate LPs (V-WH-FEFO-005 — server-side enforced; UI shows error).
6. All root elements expose `data-prototype-label`, including the two new first-class labels.

## Files
- apps/web/components/warehouse/reservations/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/reservations/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/planning/work-orders/[id]/reservations-panel.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Prototype parity
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:3-198 (composed) (available_lp_picker)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:748-805 (reserve_lp_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:808-852 (release_reservation_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:855-913 (fefo_deviation_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx:140-221 (reservations_list_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx:140-221 (panel variant) (wo_reservations_panel)
- Evidence policy: _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the AvailableLpPicker renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:3-198 (composed) (available_lp_picker), then rank-1 LP is highlighted and the root has `data-prototype-label='available_lp_picker'`.
2. Given operator selects a non-rank-1 LP, when FEFODeviation modal opens, then it shows suggested vs picked cards (prototype 855-913) and requires reason_code+reason_text(if 'other') before confirm.
3. Given an intermediate-item LP is targeted in ReserveLpModal, when submit clicked, then UI shows V-WH-FEFO-005 server error and reservation is blocked.
4. Given the WOReservationsPanel is mounted on a WO detail page, then its root has `data-prototype-label='wo_reservations_panel'` (first-class WH-017).

Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a 5th AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F6 2026-05-14).

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright + RTL covering 6 labels (incl. first-class), FEFO deviation flow, intermediate-block error.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-fefo-ui && pnpm playwright test --project=chromium --grep @warehouse-fefo-ui`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not hard-block FEFO deviation — warn + require reason (Q6B).
- Do not allow reservation creation for intermediate LPs (V-WH-FEFO-005).
- Do not omit `data-prototype-label='available_lp_picker'` or `'wo_reservations_panel'` on new first-class surfaces.

## Dependencies
- T-030
- T-031
- T-032
- T-033
